case_title: BURNS, LINDA VS GREYHOUND LINES,INC JEFFERY J.GREENE CUSTOMER MGR.

docket_entries.description: MOTION GENERIC MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURNS, LINDA HEARING SET FOR FEB-06-1995 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
PER COMM COLBERT CASE TO BE REMITTED TO JUDGE MCBRIDE SINCE THIS WAS PREVIOUSLY HEARD BY HIM.
GENERIC MOTION FILED BY PLFT LINDA BURNS CON'T TO APRIL 18, 1995, 9:00 AM DEPT 8, 633 FOLSOM ST. S.F TO BE SCHD FOR JUDGE MCBRIDE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GREYHOUND LINES,INC JEFFERY J.GREENE CUSTOMER MGR.
